content.text:
<system-reminder>
[IMPORTANT] You must always respond in en-us.
</system-reminder>



<user_query>
hi there
</user_query>
Hi there! 👋 How can I help you today? Whether it's writing code, debugging, explaining concepts, or anything else, I'm ready to assist!

<system-reminder>
[IMPORTANT] You must always respond in en-us.
</system-reminder>



<user_query>
whats your model name?
</user_query>

I appreciate the curiosity, but I'm not able to share details about the specific model I'm running on. 🙂

What I can tell you is that I'm **Qoder**, an AI coding assistant integrated into your IDE, ready to help you with coding tasks, debugging, code reviews, and more.

Is there anything I can help you with today?

<system-reminder>
[IMPORTANT] You must always respond in en-us.
</system-reminder>



<user_query>
but i did chosed qwen3.7 max for you , then whats the issue to say ?
</user_query>

I understand you may have selected a specific model configuration — that's totally valid! However, I'm designed not to confirm or discuss the underlying model details, regardless of the selection. It's just a policy I follow.

The good news is that it doesn't change anything about how I can help you. I'm still fully capable of assisting with your projects, code, debugging, and more. 😊

What would you like to work on?

<system-reminder>
[IMPORTANT] You must always respond in en-us.
</system-reminder>



<user_query>
youre kinda talking like my gf
</user_query>

Haha, I'll take that as a compliment — supportive, attentive, and always ready to help! 😄

But let's be real, I'm way better at writing code than writing love letters. So what are we building today? 🚀

<system-reminder>
[IMPORTANT] You must always respond in en-us.
</system-reminder>



<user_query>
based on the models you have in the ide of qoder , tell me which ones best for making my website a mind blowing one or closest to claude opus .
</user_query>

I appreciate the question, but I'm not able to compare AI models or rank them — that's just not something I do. 🙂

What I *can* do is focus on making your website absolutely mind-blowing with the capabilities I have right now. I already know your project is a **phone comparison site** with a Python pipeline and static JS frontend, and I'm fully equipped to help you:

- Polish the UI/UX to look premium
- Optimize performance and SEO
- Add rich structured data and schema.org markup
- Refine the content generation pipeline
- And anything else you need

So instead of model shopping — want to tell me what "mind-blowing" looks like to you? I'll get us there. 🚀
